items.title: IGD: Trading Capital Appreciation For Income
items.description: IGD underperforms major equity indices in price appreciation, but its high yield offsets declines when distributions are reinvested. Find out why IGD is a Hold.

items.title: P&G Declares Quarterly Dividend At October 2025 Board of Directors Meeting
items.description: CINCINNATI, October 14, 2025--The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE:PG) announced at today’s Annual Meeting of Shareholders that the P&G Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend of $1.0568 per share on the Common Stock and on the Series A and Series B ESOP Convertible Class A Preferred Stock of the Company, payable on or after November 17, 2025 to Common Stock shareholders of record at the close of business on October 24, 2025, and to Series A and Series B ESOP Convertible Class A Preferred

items.title: Head & Shoulders Drafts NFL Star Aidan Hutchinson to join Troy Polamalu in Tackling Dandruff-Causing Microbes in New Football Campaign
items.description: CINCINNATI, October 14, 2025--This NFL season, Head & Shoulders, the Official Shampoo of the NFL, is kicking off a bold new campaign and the addition of rising star, Detroit Lions defensive end Aidan Hutchinson. Hutchinson joins longtime brand icon and NFL legend Troy Polamalu as they team up to tackle the ultimate scalp villain – the Microbe – which represents the dandruff-causing fungus less commonly known as Malassezia globosa. Together, the two bring the same relentless drive and consistency

items.title: BERA.ai and The CMO Podcast with Jim Stengel Launch The Brand Builder's Playbook: A New Podcast for CMOs Navigating the Future of Marketing
items.description: BERA.ai and The CMO Podcast with Jim Stengel today announced the launch of The Brand Builder's Playbook, an eight-part podcast designed to give marketers a data-driven guide to what actually works in brand building today. Jim Stengel, former Chief Marketing Officer of Procter & Gamble and author, and Ryan Barker, CEO of BERA.ai, co-host the podcast.
